query: UPDATE pipeline_runs SET status = 'failed', stage = 'failed', completedAt = NOW(), errorLog = 'Server restarted mid-run — auto-reset by system' WHERE status = 'running' AND startedAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3X7ymVRNW2gRHR2.root --database AU2Bbcsi9Q6EAtrWDQRvTo --execute UPDATE pipeline_runs SET status = 'failed', stage = 'failed', completedAt = NOW(), errorLog = 'Server restarted mid-run — auto-reset by system' WHERE status = 'running' AND startedAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE);
